Species-Elf — Male Elf Fighter: 5
Strength: 13 (+1) Dexterity: 10 (+0) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good
Ability Boosts: Charisma; Intelligence; Wisdom Experience: 6864/14000 Level: 5 Size: Medium Speed: 35 Carry/Lift: 195/390
Ability Notes:
Wood Elf: +5 Speed
Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Tactical Mind: Can add 1d10 to a failed ability check, expending a use of Second Wind if the result is a success
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: Fighting Style; General Selectable Feature Count: Elf (Elf Spellcasting Ability); Elf (Elven Lineage); Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability); Fighter (Fighter Subclass)
Feats: Archery; Savage Attacker Elf Features: Charisma; Darkvision; Drow; Elf Spellcasting Ability; Elven Lineage; Fey Ancestry; High Elf; Keen Senses; Trance; Wood Elf Fighter Features: Action Surge; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Champion; Dexterity; Extra Attack; Fighter Primary Ability; Fighter Subclass; Fighting Style; Improved Critical; Remarkable Athlete; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Tactical Mind; Tactical Shift; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Drow: Has increased Darkvision effects
Elf Spellcasting Ability: 1 selection
Elven Lineage: 1 selection
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighter Subclass: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Darkvision: R120' Sees one light level better
Trance: 4 hr meditation gives the benefits of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Animal Handling; Insight; Perception, Survival; Religion
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +4 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +0
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +0
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +1 Survival: (wis) +1
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Keen Senses: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Insight, Perception, or Survival)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on Athletics
Combat
Hit Points: 24 Initiative: +0 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Chain Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Rapier (+4 1d8+1 P; Vex); Scimitar (+4 1d6+1 S; Nick); Unarmed (+4 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +5
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Action Surge: Can take an extra action once per short rest
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Improved Critical: Scores a possible critical on a natural 19
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on initiative and can move 17' after scoring a critical hit without provoking opportunity attacks
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+5 hit points 3 times per long rest; can regain 1 use after a short rest
Tactical Shift: Using Second Wind allows moving 17' without provoking opportunity attacks
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +4; Dexterity: +0; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes: Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charmed
Magic
Attack: C: 4; Elf: 5 Spell DC: C: 12; Elf: 13
Spells:
Dancing Lights (Drow0 [Drow] Evoc): R120' 4 torch lights dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per rd as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min
Darkness (Drow2 [Drow] Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Detect Magic (High Elf1 [High Elf] Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Druidcraft (Wood Elf0 [Wood Elf] Tran): R30' Predicts 24 hr weather, causes a plant to bloom, creates a minor sensory effect, or lights or snuffs a small fire
Faerie Fire (Drow1 [Drow] Evoc): R60' Objects in a 20' cube glow, giving their foes advantage on attacks (save Dexterity negates), for concentration up to 1 min
Longstrider (Wood Elf1 [Wood Elf] Tran): Touched gains +10' Speed for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Misty Step (High Elf2 [High Elf] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Pass Without Trace (Wood Elf2 [Wood Elf] Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Prestidigitation (High Elf0 [High Elf] Tran): R10' Creates minor magic effects for 1 hr
Magic Notes:
Drow: Knows the Dancing Lights cantrip and can cast Faerie Fire and Darkness once per long rest
High Elf: Knows the Prestidigitation cantrip and can cast Detect Magic and Misty Step once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Wood Elf: Knows the Druidcraft cantrip and can cast Longstrider and Pass Without Trace once per long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 4 available vs. 6 allocated
